tests.title: Export PDF runs the configured lualatex plugin and carries the witnesses
errors: Error: Export PDF artifact never appeared at /tmp/pandoc-preview-proof-runs/20260619T132739Z/tests/proof/p08-export-pdf/export-witness.pdf (result: {"success":false,"artifact":null,"exit_code":null,"stdout":"","stderr":"error: no plugin with id \"pandoc-pdf-export\" in the plugins dir"}). The generic plugin firewall did not discover/run the shipped pandoc-pdf-export export plugin against the real buffer.
